articles.title: Cambridge man killed in early-morning shooting, investigators say
articles.description:
At around 5:30 a.m., the man was found dead near the intersection of Broadway and Norfolk Street in Cambridge.

The post Cambridge man killed in early-morning shooting, investigators say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge man found dead from shooting at 5:30 a.m. near Broadway and Norfolk Street.
Investigation ongoing as police seek witnesses to the early-morning incident.
Residents concerned about safety following this violent event in their neighborhood.

articles.title: All-Star snub helps fuel Red Sox pitcher Sonny Gray in 8-1 win over Angels
articles.description:
“Things happen, so I’m still holding out hope for a couple more guys on the team who I feel are deserving.”

The post All-Star snub helps fuel Red Sox pitcher Sonny Gray in 8-1 win over Angels appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox pitcher Sonny Gray led the team to an 8-1 victory over the Angels.
Gray expressed hope for teammates deserving All-Star recognition after his own snub.
This win boosts team morale as they aim for playoff contention in 2026.

articles.title: New England Aquarium trainer joins effort to save endangered penguin chicks in South Africa
articles.description:
Scientists warn the species is nearing extinction within the next decade, but conservationists say there's still hope.

The post New England Aquarium trainer joins effort to save endangered penguin chicks in South Africa appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New England Aquarium trainer collaborates on penguin conservation efforts in South Africa.
Scientists predict extinction for the species within the next decade without intervention.
Boston residents can support local conservation initiatives to help endangered wildlife.
